TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Alolong, title = Alolong, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alolong} }

S.FORM: alang Alolong ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Guangfu, kwara sali buwan nya ga 18 buwan, 58 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 53 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 90%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Alolong hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Alolong hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Alolong hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Alolong hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Alolong hya' ga Kalotong. tay 'zil na Alolong hya' ga Fahol. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Alolong ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Guangfu, kwara sali buwan nya ga 18 buwan, 58 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 53 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 90%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Alolong hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Alolong hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Alolong hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Alolong hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Alolong hya' ga Kalotong. tay 'zil na Alolong hya' ga Fahol. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ aloloŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ɣuaŋ*u, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na aloloŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na aloloŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na aloloŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na aloloŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na aloloŋ ħjaʔ ɣa kalotoŋ. taj ʔzil na aloloŋ ħjaʔ ɣa *aħol. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
